'''mawusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mealworm|mealworm]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-w-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mealworm|mealworm]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| mawusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæwisith|mæwisith]] || [[word:mæwisij|mæwisij]] || [[word:mæwisish|mæwisish]] || [[word:mæwisi|mæwisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mawuwusuth|mawuwusuth]] || [[word:mawuwusuj|mawuwusuj]] || [[word:mawuwusush|mawuwusush]] || [[word:mawuwusu|mawuwusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mawusuth|mawusuth]] || [[word:mawusuj|mawusuj]] || [[word:mawusush|mawusush]] || [[word:mawusu|mawusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mawufsuth|mawufsuth]] || [[word:mawufsuj|mawufsuj]] || [[word:mawufsush|mawufsush]] || [[word:mawufsuf|mawufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mawusuthu|mawusuthu]] || [[word:mawusuju|mawusuju]] || [[word:mawusushu|mawusushu]] || [[word:mawusuku|mawusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mawusuth|mawusuth]] || [[word:mawusuj|mawusuj]] || [[word:mawusush|mawusush]] || [[word:mawusu|mawusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mawusuthul|mawusuthul]] || [[word:mawusujul|mawusujul]] || [[word:mawusushul|mawusushul]] || [[word:mawusukul|mawusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mawusuthuthu|mawusuthuthu]] || [[word:mawusujuju|mawusujuju]] || [[word:mawusushushu|mawusushushu]] || [[word:mawusuku|mawusuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mawusuthun|mawusuthun]] || [[word:mawusujun|mawusujun]] || [[word:mawusushun|mawusushun]] || [[word:mawusukun|mawusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mawusuthuoro|mawusuthuoro]] || [[word:mawusujuoro|mawusujuoro]] || [[word:mawusushuoro|mawusushuoro]] || [[word:mawusukuoro|mawusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
